footer.tagline: Fresh sandwiches, warm vibes, and all things The Sandwich Bar — follow along for daily specials and behind-the-counter moments.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.p1: Welcome to The Sandwich Bar — where every sandwich is crafted with care, fresh ingredients, and a whole lot of love.
aboutPage.p2: Founded with a simple mission: to make the best sandwiches in town. We source our bread from local bakeries, our meats from trusted farms, and our vegetables from nearby growers.
aboutPage.p3: Whether you're grabbing a quick lunch or sitting down for a leisurely meal, we're here to make your day a little tastier.

aboutSection.p1: The Sandwich Bar is the place in Amsterdam for a fresh, classic sandwich — made with high-quality, locally sourced ingredients. From a simple cheese to our famous spicy chicken, complemented by fresh juices and barista coffee from Bocca Amsterdam.
aboutSection.p2: Come by for a quick lunch or a relaxed moment with friends. In a hurry? Call ahead and we'll have your sandwich ready.

catering.label: Catering
catering.title: Looking for the best sandwich catering in Amsterdam?
catering.p1: The Sandwich Bar is here for you! Our dedicated team of professionals is happy to take care of your office meeting, corporate event, birthday, wedding, or any other occasion with delicious, freshly prepared sandwiches. We deliver our lunch catering throughout Amsterdam (and on request in surrounding areas).
catering.p2: At The Sandwich Bar we believe in quality and variety. Our menu offers a wide range of flavours and ingredients, and we are happy to accommodate dietary requirements — including gluten-free, vegetarian, and vegan options.

cateringPage.heroTitle: Catering done right — fresh, flexible, and always on time
cateringPage.heroSubtitle: The Sandwich Bar catering delivers richly topped sandwiches to your team — no fuss and budget-friendly. Discover it yourself with a free trial lunch box: 5 freshly made sandwiches, delivered straight to your office. Ready to taste?
cateringPage.formTitle: Order your free trial lunch box
cateringPage.formSubtitle: Fill in the form below and we'll deliver 5 freshly made sandwiches to your office.
cateringPage.formNote: It is not possible to order a trial box for today — minimum one day in advance.
cateringPage.successMessage: We'll be in touch soon to confirm your free trial lunch box.
cateringPage.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email orders@thesandwichbar.nl

member.label: Loyalty programme
member.p1: For every euro you spend at one of our locations, you earn 1 loyalty point.
member.p2: You can redeem your saved points for great rewards — think a sandwich of your choice, BOCCA coffee beans, or an awesome sandwich bar hoodie.
member.p3: Can you already picture yourself rocking our hoodie? Scan the QR code at any of our locations when you visit and start earning!
member.ctaLabel: Already a member and want to check your balance?
